title: palicourea condorica
intro: Palicourea condorica is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "yerba de la montaña" or "mountain tea". It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its high concentration of alkaloids such as palicoureine and condorine. The health benefits of Palicourea condorica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Palicourea condorica can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
